## Framework Details

<!-- e.g., PDPA (Personal Data Protection Act) -->

**Jurisdiction / Country:**
<!-- e.g., Philippines (PH) -->

**Publisher / Regulator:**
<!-- e.g., National Privacy Commission -->

**Category:**
<!-- e.g., Privacy Regulation, Financial Services, Security Standard -->

**Is this framework mandatory or advisory?**
<!-- Mandatory (legal requirement) / Advisory (best practice) -->

<!-- Brief description of why this mapping would be valuable — e.g., "We operate in the Philippines and need to demonstrate PDPA compliance alongside ISO 27001" -->
